About.metaDescription: Sukhyeon's career timeline and attitude toward software.
About.heading: The attitude I bring to software
About.intro: Moving from a factory engineer to a frontend engineer taught me an attitude: turn hard problems into structure, and build systems that didn't exist before.

Projects.metaDescription: Case studies showing what problems Sukhyeon actually solved, and how.
Projects.heading: What problems, solved how
Projects.intro: Not just what was built, but what problem it solved and why — organized as Challenge / Action / Result.

Lab.metaDescription: Technical experiments and live demos — 3D Playground, HTML Report Viewer.
Lab.heading: Proof that I can actually build it
Lab.intro: Not a finished product, but a space to prove skills through experiments that actually run.

items.title: 3D Playground
items.description: An interactive demo showing how position, rotation, and bounding-box math update in real time as you manipulate a 3D object with your mouse.

items.title: HTML Report Viewer
items.description: A demo that renders a report as real HTML blocks — drag to reorder, edit inline, and print/export to PDF straight from the browser with Print CSS.

reportViewer.metaDescription: Try block drag-reordering, inline editing, and Print CSS-based PDF output yourself.
reportViewer.heading: A report viewer that runs entirely in the browser
reportViewer.intro: Reorder a real, text-rendered document by dragging, edit it inline, then check the print preview.
